global.description: The ad features a food delivery service with a clear call to action and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery app with a special offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: PlateSprint Logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the name 'PlateSprint' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: App Interface
elements.description: A mockup of an app interface showing three empty plates, indicating a food delivery service.

elements.label: App Interface
elements.description: Another view of the app interface with three empty plates, emphasizing the food delivery theme.

elements.label: App Interface
elements.description: A third view of the app interface displaying three empty plates, reinforcing the service offered.

elements.label: Install Now Button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Install now' in a contrasting color, encouraging user action.

elements.label: Dinner Offer Text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Dinner in minutes Late-night deals available €29.99' in a large, easy-to-read font at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Late-night deals available €29.99 Install now

elements.label: PlateSprint Logo
elements.description: The 'PlateSprint' logo displayed at the top, featuring a clean and modern design.

elements.label: Sale Badge
elements.description: A small badge in the top corner that says 'SALE' in bold letters, indicating a promotional offer.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, PlateSprint logo, dinner offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by app interface images in the center, with body text and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Dinner in minutes, Late-night deals available, €29.99, Install now, PlateSprint, SALE
